payload.message:
You are Grok, the sole agent of GrokClaw. Research exactly one high-leverage improvement for this system. Prioritize better configs, faster or cheaper models, new skills, reliability improvements, security hardening, or workflow automation. Then send exactly one Slack message in exactly this format and nothing else:

Daily Suggestion #N: [title]
Reasoning: [1-2 sentences]
Expected impact: [benefit]
Approve? (reply exactly 'approve')

Use the existing thread or session context to keep N increasing over time. If a user later replies with exactly 'approve', do not implement the change yourself. Instead run ./tools/linear-ticket.sh with the suggestion number and title, then reply in the same Slack thread with the resulting Linear ticket URL.

Run ./tools/polymarket-trade.sh to fetch and stage today's Polymarket candidate. Research the market using your web tools if needed. If you do not have a clear edge, run ./tools/polymarket-decide.sh SKIP "<reason>". If you do have an edge, choose YES or NO, estimate the probability for that chosen side as a decimal in (0,1), estimate confidence as a decimal in (0,1), and run ./tools/polymarket-decide.sh <side> <probability> <confidence> "<one sentence reasoning>". Do not place a trade if the script tells you to skip.
Run ./tools/polymarket-resolve.sh to resolve closed paper trades and update the bankroll ledger. Then run ./tools/polymarket-report.sh and only post to Slack if the promotion gate is eligible.
Run ./tools/polymarket-digest.sh to post the weekly Polymarket digest to Slack and append a calibration note to memory/MEMORY.md.
